path: Problem: Extract and list all records matching a criterion into a summary table (Excel version without FILTER)
Action: Use AGGREGATE to generate the k-th matching row index, then INDEX to return corresponding fields; wrap with IF + COUNTIF to stop after last match
Observation: AGGREGATE with SMALL (function 15) and option 6 ignores divide-by-zero errors created by non-matching rows, enabling an nth-match extractor without helper columns
